calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment And Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Roam San Francisco, LLC and Roam International, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Angela Bradstreet. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

William P. Klein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff No More Dirt, Inc.
Cori Chipman, Chief Operations Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Roam San Francisco, LLC or Roam International, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on March 25, 2019.
Summons & Complaint personally served on defendant Roam International, Inc.'s authorized Agent of Process on March 26, 2019.
Summons & Complaint personally served on defendant Roam San Francisco, LLC's authorized Agent of Process on March 27, 2019.
Default as to defendants Roam San Francisco, LLC and Roam International, Inc. was entered on May 9, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 9, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff No More Dirt, Inc., and against the defaulted defendants Roam San Francisco, LLC and Roam International, Inc., as follows:

Damages - $34,389.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,091.60.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $593.90.
Total - $38,074.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Continued To Dec-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
